chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-509 of 2019. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A-2979 of 2019 (Urgency application). 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on M.A-2980 of 2019 (Exemption application). 4. For hearing of main case. 26.03.2019. Mr. Abdul Sattar Sarki, Advocate for the Petitioner. = 1. Urgent application granted. 2 to 4. Through this petition, Petitioner Ali Mardan Khan submits that F.I.R. bearing Crime No.15/2019 of P.S Moya got registered upon the orders of Ex- Officio Justice of Peace, Tando Muhammad Khan dated 12.03.2019, which is being investigated by Respondent No.6. He apprehends that I.O. of the aforementioned crime has become partial and is going to dispose of his case and thereby they will be prejudiced, hence, submits that the investigation of the said crime be entrusted to a police officer belonging to other District. Beside this prayer, Petitioner also prays to provide protection against the harassment and highhandedness of the concerned police at the behest of private Respondents. Be that as it may, as per the provisions set down by the Police Reforms Committee, a Complaint Cell headed by S.S.P Complaint has been established in every District, therefore, the best course for the Petitioner was to approach the S.S.P Complaint Cell instead of approaching this Court directly. On query, learned counsel for petitioner admits that he has not approached the S.S.P Complaint Cell concerned. Accordingly, office is directed to send copy of instant petition and its annexures, if any, to S.S.P Complaint Cell, Tando Muhammad Khan.

On query, learned counsel for petitioner admits that he has not approached the S.S.P Complaint Cell concerned. Accordingly, office is directed to send copy of instant petition and its annexures, if any, to S.S.P Complaint Cell, Tando Muhammad Khan. Since, there are allegations of malfeasance and misfeasance against police, as such the S.S.P Complaint Cell concerned, shall conduct probe in the matter, complete such enquiry within two weeks and redress grievance of the petitioner. Needless to mention here that, no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner directly or indirectly at the behest of private respondents and the official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of alongwith all pending applications if any, in the terms stated above. JUDGE JUDGE S
